title: Sakshi Case Record
description: The single source of truth for a published case record. This is a civic-accountability record of a PUBLICLY REPORTED case, not a crime-rate statistic and not legal advice. Victim identity is NEVER ingested: by design there is no field capable of holding a victim/survivor name, age (beyond the boolean minor_involved), address, family, school, workplace, photo, contact, or any re-identifying detail. Dedup and matching are case-anchored (FIR/CNR/station/district/date/court), never on identity. additionalProperties:false at every object level makes forbidden fields impossible.

id.description: Deterministically assigned, never reused. SKS-{4-digit year}-{2-letter STATE code}-{6-digit zero-padded serial}.

cnr.description: Court Case Number (CNR) from eCourts/NJDG when available. Used for exact-match dedup.

fir_ref.description: First Information Report reference. Used for case-anchored dedup, never for identity.

state.description: 2-letter Indian state/UT code (e.g. TG, AP, MH, DL, KA, TN, UP, WB).

incident_reported_date.description: Date the case was publicly reported/registered. ISO YYYY-MM-DD.

minor_involved.description: Whether a minor is involved. This is the ONLY age-related fact stored; no actual age is ever recorded (POCSO Act s.23).

status.description: Current judicial status per public court records. Presumption of innocence applies; ACQUITTED and QUASHED are rendered with equal prominence.

status_history.description: Chronological status changes. Each entry cites a source by integer index into sources[].

source.description: Zero-based index into this record's sources[] array.

accused.description: Accused persons. An accused is presumed innocent until proven guilty. Names are stored ONLY when present in an official court record.

name_public_court_record.description: Accused name ONLY when it appears in an official court record (judgment/order/cause list). null for media-sourced cases; the UI then shows "Withheld (media-sourced, not yet in court record)".

next_hearing.description: Next hearing date if scheduled, else null. ISO YYYY-MM-DD.

pending_days.description: Days the case has been pending, for accountability surfacing.

summary.description: One-paragraph neutral, non-graphic summary. Contains NO victim details.

sources.description: Citable public sources. Nothing without a citable public source is published.

retrieved.description: Date the source was retrieved. ISO YYYY-MM-DD.

confidence.description: Extraction confidence 0..1. Records below 0.8 are quarantined to data/_review/ and never auto-published.

last_verified.description: Date this record was last verified against sources. ISO YYYY-MM-DD.

examples.summary: Illustrative synthetic record. Neutral, non-graphic summary with no victim details.
